data.title: What's Going On With VinFast Auto Stock Wednesday?
data.description: VinFast Auto shares are relatively flat in premarket trading today. Yesterday, the company reported 21,912 EV deliveries for Q3, a significant increase from previous periods.

data.title: Starbucks Halloween-Themed 'Wicked' Drinks Hit Stores Alongside New Movie Merch Amid Weak Q4 Prelim Results
data.description: These themed drinks were made available from Oct. 22 in the U.S., Canada, and select international locations.

data.title: AdvisorShares MSOS Climbs 8% As Cannabis Rescheduling Sparks Investor Interest
data.description: AdvisorShares MSOS ETF surges 8% as U.S. cannabis reform nears. Explore key investment signals and market opportunities.

data.title: General Dynamics Delivers Mixed Q3 Performance, Aerospace And Marine Systems Lead Revenue Gains
data.description: General Dynamics revenue for the quarter increased 10.4% year over year to $11.671 billion, beating the consensus of $11.641 billion.

data.title: Why Calidi Biotherapeutics (CLDI) Stock Is Down 13%
data.description: Calidi Biotherapeutics shares are trading lower by 12.4% Wednesday. The company announced a $2 million registered direct offering at $1.00 per share.
